meta.title: DEF CON 33 - 10 Years of IoT Village: nsights in the World of IoT - Stephen Bono, Rachael Tubbs
meta.description: Join IoT Village co-founders Steve Bono and Ted Harrington as they discuss how the world of IoT security has evolved in the past 10 years of IoT Village. Led by panel host Rachael Tubbs, Steve and Ted will discuss with industry experts what we've learned in 10 years about the state of IoT security.
